Q-COAL-PHASEOUT

frozen 2026-07-21 · template: multilateral_bargaining · horizon: one_shot

Year of coal-power phase-out
0 = earliest phase-out (2030)  ·  100 = latest phase-out (2040)

Actor map

Stakeholders

actorpositionsaliencecapabilityevidence
low / mode / highlow / mode / highlow / mode / high
Aland
aland		0 / 0 / 1080 / 90 / 9590 / 100 / 100
Aland wants 2030 and is the most economically powerful. — situation, 2026-07-21
Belland
belland		90 / 100 / 10060 / 70 / 8040 / 50 / 60
Belland wants 2040. — situation, 2026-07-21
Cesta
cesta		45 / 50 / 5550 / 55 / 6030 / 40 / 50
Cesta wants 2035, the midpoint. — situation, 2026-07-21

Open assumptions — review before solving

  • Capabilities are scaled with Aland at 100 as the strongest.
    The situation states only that Aland is the most economically powerful, not exact capability ratios.
  • Saliences reflect each power's stated insistence on its date.
    The situation gives positions but no explicit salience figures.
